channel.title: intel on Artoo.ai
channel.description: Recent content in intel on Artoo.ai

item.title: Intel Euclid
item.description: Connect to Website Connect to WIFI SSID Euclid_2541 Go to the URL 10.42.0.1 Use the web browser to control the camera. VNC Install RealVNC Client on Windows or Vinagre on Ubuntu Connect to Euclid using the following IP 10.42.0.1:5900 Password is “euclid” View ROS nodes export ROS_MASTER_URI=http://10.42.0.1:11311 rostopic list rosnode list rosmsg list Install Python Library To Test Euclid export ROS_MASTER_URI=http://10.42.0.1:11311 rostopic list Run your Python application
